channel.title: Daily Quote — Rev. Randy Lewis
channel.description: A daily quote from the writings and sermons of Rev. Randy Lewis

item.title: Love never left us—we just grew dim for a while, shadowed by fear, anger, and exhaustion.
item.description:
In moments of darkness, we often forget that love is our guiding light. As we navigate through fear and exhaustion, let us remember that healing and hope are ever-present, waiting for us to embrace them anew. Together, we can rise, resilient and united in love. https://blog.revrandylewis.com/bad-moon-rising
#Healing #Hope #Resilience #Love #Humanity

item.title: ‘Unbroken’ doesn’t mean untouched. It means the breaking stopped with us.
item.description:
Healing is not about being untouched; it’s about recognizing our scars and choosing to stop the cycle of pain. Together, we can build a legacy of resilience and strength for future generations. https://blog.revrandylewis.com/unbroken
#Healing #Resilience #Family #Legacy

item.title: Give us the courage and fortitude to do what is in our power to do. May we work toward the greater good, being always mindful of how our actions, or inaction, affect others.
item.description:
In times of uncertainty and strife, we must summon the courage to act toward the greater good. Each of us holds the power to influence our communities positively, and it’s vital to recognize how our choices impact others. Let us embody compassion and justice in our daily lives, honoring those affected by violence and working tirelessly for a brighter future.
Read more: https://blog.revrandylewis.com/prayer-at-the-vigil-for-victims-of-gun-violence
#Community #Compassion #Courage #Justice
